scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace=@project-matchmaker/shared && npm run dev --workspace=@project-matchmaker/web
scripts.dev:web: npm run build --workspace=@project-matchmaker/shared && npm run dev --workspace=@project-matchmaker/web
scripts.dev:realtime: npm run build --workspace=@project-matchmaker/shared && npm run dev --workspace=@project-matchmaker/realtime
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@project-matchmaker/shared && npm run build --workspace=@project-matchmaker/web && npm run build --workspace=@project-matchmaker/realtime
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace=@project-matchmaker/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace=@project-matchmaker/web && npm run typecheck --workspace=@project-matchmaker/realtime
